task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: applies to the issuance of driving licences in category AM only if so required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time or renewed or
for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E or
for category AM

exception.description: for category AM, the medical examination is required only if so required by the Member State
Not required if alternative measures are used
Not required if alternative measures are used

conditions.condition: for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E or
for category AM

exception.description: For category AM, the medical examination may be required

task.label: Require the applicant to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: for driving licence categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
notwithstanding paragraphs 1 and 2
to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III
for driving licence categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
if required instead of a medical examination
to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for driving licence categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
if required instead of a medical examination
applicable after the licence has been issued following a prior medical examination or self-assessment

task.label: Provide for appropriate measures to address non-compliance

conditions.condition: for non-compliance with the requirement to fill in a self-assessment form or
for knowingly providing information in the self-assessment form that is incorrect or incomplete or
for failing to meet any requirement established in accordance with paragraph 3, point (b)

task.label: Apply the national system to monitor

conditions.condition: if the Member State has established a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

task.label: Ensure that the applicant undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: if applicant is likely to have the medical conditions
if awareness is required

task.label: Take measures to improve the knowledge of the health sector

conditions.condition: if knowledge improvement is required
if adopting of guidelines is required

task.label: Inform the Commission of guidelines adopted

conditions.condition: if the Member State adopts guidelines for medical practitioners

task.label: Make available to the other Member States the guidelines adopted

conditions.condition: upon being informed by a Member State of the adoption of such guidelines
if awareness campaigns are required

task.label: Inform the Commission of any public awareness campaigns developed

conditions.condition: if the Member State develops public awareness campaigns

task.label: Make available to the other Member States the information

conditions.condition: upon being informed by a Member State of such public awareness campaigns

task.label: Set standards stricter than those set out in Annex III

conditions.condition: if stricter standards are required
